text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
While out shopping one day, I spot<n>Nishino Flower
standing in a store's<n>nail product section. She
looks lost.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
This is all nail polish? There's so<n>many. I don't
even know where to<n>start...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... How 'bout the one up there?<n>It dries quick
and doesn't chip easy.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Jordan?! U-um, this isn't what it looks<n>like!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? So... you're not buying nail<n>stuff?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Who, me? Th-that'd just look weird.<n>I-I mean, it's
not like doing my nails<n>like an adult will actually
make me<n>one, right?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, no shame in owning up.<n>Which one do
you want?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: W-well, um...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
For now, why don'tcha just pick a<n>color you vibe
with? Don't worry<n>about the base coat, I'll lend
you<n>mine.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um, then... a pink one. I think Bourbon<n>would like
that too...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you two are gonna match? Hmm...<n>How's one
of these pinks, then?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hold it right there, Jordan! You're<n>biasing her
decision!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hear her out first! Do you even know<n>why she's
here?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yikes, killjoy alert. C'mon, Flower,<n>let's go.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Killjoy?! I'm only giving my sincere<n>advice as a
class repre—

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
All right, all right! If you're so worried,<n>why don't
you tag along then? That<n>goes for you over there
too, snoops!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Paint all the way to the edges... but<n>not too far...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower carefully follows<n>Tosen Jordan's
instructions as she<n>paints the nails I offered up for
practice. They turn out a lovely pink.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yep, looking good. All that's left is to<n>let them dry.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I had no idea just painting them<n>would be so
difficult. Maybe I'm still<n>not ready for this...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, look. Painting your nails—all<n>fashion, really—is
something you do<n>for yourself, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
It's like when you look in the mirror<n>after doing
your makeup, and you're<n>like, "Wow, you're
killing it, girl."<n>Kinda like our signature racewear
too,<n>actually.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oh, yeah! I get super fired up when I<n>put mine on!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Right? So if you wanna give offgrown-up vibes, you gotta look thepart so you can feel the part! Here—lean over for a sec.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan pulls out a translucent<n>lip gloss from
her pouch and applies it<n>to Nishino Flower's lips.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
What do you think? Not much<n>difference
looks-wise, but you feel<n>glowed-up, right?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Ehehe, you're right. I already<n>feel a little more
mature!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
There you go. Told you—look the part<n>and the
rest'll follow.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I wholeheartedly agree! As class<n>representative, I
make sure I always<n>look the part!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh... Actually, your hair's, like, nevernot perfect. Don't tell me you'rethe super fussy type?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha ha, so you've noticed! I<n>always keep my
hair in order—just<n>like my priorities! As soon as
it's tied<n>up, I'm in full class rep mode!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
So you start with looks too! I<n>remember when
Jordan did my nails<n>during the sweets
competition—I felt<n>like a grown-up!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm... I'm going to get better at doing<n>my nails!
Jordan, please teach me<n>everything you know!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Bet. Hit me up whenever, 'kay?
